alt_name: أبي علي عيسى ابن إسحاق الحمصي
desc: Melkite translator from Greek to Arabic. Native of Hims (Emesa), active in Damascus. Translated Dionysius the Areopagite and other patristic works. Also appears in Sinai Arabic 252.
note: Attested in colophon, Sinai Arabic 268; confirmed as known Melkite translator from Greek to Arabic, native of Hims, active in Damascus (early 11th c.) in: S. Griffith, "The Church Fathers in Arabic Translations" (Receptio Patristica, 2024)
